title: Wynncraft World Event Tracker
description: A simple world event tracker for Wynncraft.
body:
Hello, and welcome to my mod for Wynncraft. This is a mod that crowdsources data for world events. It then notifies every user who is actively tracking that world event, so you can see world events globally with no proximity restrictions on notifications. This mod was confirmed to be compliant with the moderation rules, so you don't have to worry about legality!

# News:
We're back baby! 2.0 update is HERE and it's improved and easier to use!

![WET 2 is bigger, better and certainly wetter!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d841b302621a11059e5a9a3986023721c76b8e9c_0.webp)

## Important!

Big thank you to Pixlze and the [Guild Api](https://modrinth.com/mod/guild-api) mod for aiding and giving code that was vital to the projects functionality, please go check them out!

# VERSIONS 1.3 AND LOWER ARE NO LONGER SUPPORTED

Please update to 2.0

## Commands

The commands are simple, but if you ever forget you can always type `/wet help`

To track a world event, type `/wet track <world event name>`

To to track all world events type `/wet track all`


To untrack a world event, type  `/wet untrack <world event name>`

To untrack all events, type `/wet untrack all`

To reconnect to the chat server, type `/wet reconnect`


To see the list of events you are tracking, type `/wet list`


To see the credits for people who made the mod, type `/wet credits`




If you encounter and bugs or issues, don't hesitate to contact me on discord. My discord is Samuelblue123, or join the official discord [here](https://discord.gg/QaunTXd3gh).

If you enjoy this mod, please consider donating [here](https://ko-fi.com/samuelblue123).

Also huge thanks to Orphion_ for helping ensure the mod was as stable as possible before release!
